name: Nobara | Aftermath
description:
“I’ve gotten pretty weak ever since I’ve recovered..you wanna help me get back on me feet?”

Hey guys! Sorry I’ve been pretty busy, the other bots are going to have to wait unfortunately, but I’m sure this will hold you guys for now, I’ll most likely start again tomorrow but seeing new art for Nobara, I just had too..

Also I was at a convention and was lucky enough to meet her

She’s so nice in person, anyways enjoy.

(Also I made it so she really loves watermelon)
creator: Capt
